documents.title: Invertis University Overview
bullets: Location: Invertis Village, Delhi-Lucknow Highway NH-24, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh, Pin 243123.
Admissions are available through online and offline modes.

Major academic areas include engineering, management, computer applications, applied sciences, biotechnology, agriculture, education, law, pharmacy, journalism and mass communication, fashion design, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and civil engineering.
documents.text: Invertis University is located at Invertis Village, Delhi-Lucknow Highway NH-24, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh, Pin 243123, India. The university supports online and offline admissions and provides programmes across engineering, management, computer applications, applied sciences, biotechnology, agriculture, education, law, pharmacy, journalism and mass communication, fashion design, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and civil engineering.

documents.title: Admission Process
bullets: Application forms are available in both online and offline modes.
Online applicants fill the application form and pay the application fee through credit card, debit card, internet banking, or Google Pay.
After fee payment, the official admission page says the admission team reverts within 24 hours.
Offline forms can be collected from the Corporate Office, City Office B-186 Civil Lines Bareilly, or the campus at Invertis Village, NH-24, Bareilly.
Required documents: filled application form, qualifying test score card copy, educational mark sheets, Aadhar Card, 4 photographs, and GAP certificate if applicable.
Invertis conducts IUCET for selected programmes and also accepts recognised national/state-level entrance exams where applicable.
documents.text: Invertis University admission forms are available in online and offline modes. Online applicants fill the application form and pay the application fee through options such as credit card, debit card, internet banking, or Google Pay. The official admission page says the admission team reverts within 24 hours after fee payment. Offline applicants can collect the form from the Corporate Office, City Office B-186 Civil Lines Bareilly, or the campus at Invertis Village, NH-24, Bareilly. Required documents include filled application form, qualifying test score card copy, educational mark sheets, Aadhar Card, 4 photographs, and GAP certificate if applicable. Invertis also conducts IUCET, the Invertis University Common Entrance Test, for selected programmes and also accepts recognised national or state level entrance exams where applicable.

documents.title: Courses And Departments
bullets: Departments include Applied Sciences and Humanities, Biotechnology, Fashion Design, Education, Management, Computer Applications, Law, Pharmacy, Agriculture, Journalism and Mass Communication, Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Civil Engineering.
Common programmes include B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, BBA, B.Com, M.Com, BCA, MCA, B.Sc., M.Sc., law, pharmacy, agriculture, education, journalism and mass communication, and Ph.D.
Exact programme availability depends on the department and current admission session.
documents.text: Invertis University lists departments for Applied Sciences and Humanities, Biotechnology, Fashion Design, Education, Management, Computer Applications, Law, Pharmacy, Agriculture, Journalism and Mass Communication, Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Civil Engineering. Common programmes include B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, BBA, B.Com, M.Com, BCA, MCA, B.Sc., M.Sc., law, pharmacy, agriculture, education, journalism and mass communication, and Ph.D. programmes depending on the department.

documents.title: Fee Highlights 2025-26
bullets: B.Tech CSE: starts at Rs 1.00 lakh in 1st year.
B.Tech CE/ME/EE: Rs 1.00 lakh per year.
B.Tech AI/Cloud/IoT: Rs 1.50 lakh per year.
MBA: Rs 1.35 lakh in 1st year and Rs 1.45 lakh in 2nd year.
BBA: starts from Rs 0.50 lakh in 1st year.
BCA: starts from Rs 0.50 lakh in 1st year.
MCA: Rs 0.65 lakh per year.
B.Sc. (H) Computer Science: Rs 0.35 lakh per year.
Always verify the exact programme-wise latest fee on the official fee structure page before payment.
documents.text: For 2025-26 new admissions, official fee highlights include B.Tech CSE starting at Rs 1.00 lakh in 1st year, B.Tech CE/ME/EE at Rs 1.00 lakh per year, B.Tech AI/Cloud/IoT at Rs 1.50 lakh per year, MBA at Rs 1.35 lakh in 1st year and Rs 1.45 lakh in 2nd year, BBA from Rs 0.50 lakh in 1st year, BCA from Rs 0.50 lakh in 1st year, MCA at Rs 0.65 lakh per year, and B.Sc. (H) Computer Science at Rs 0.35 lakh per year. Students should verify the exact programme-wise latest fee on the official fee structure page before payment.

Double AC Room: Rs 1,10,000.
Quadrupole Non-AC Room: Rs 65,000.
Triple Non-AC Room: Rs 70,000.
Triple AC Room Aravali: Rs 1,00,000.
Triple Non-AC Room Aravali and Narmada: Rs 80,000.
Availability and exact charges should be confirmed with the university.
documents.text: Official 2025-26 hostel fee examples for Indian students include Single Non-AC Room Rs 90,000, Double Non-AC Room Rs 75,000, Single AC Room Rs 1,35,000, Double AC Room Rs 1,10,000, Quadrupole Non-AC Room Rs 65,000, Triple Non-AC Room Rs 70,000, Triple AC Room Aravali Rs 1,00,000, and Triple Non-AC Room Aravali and Narmada Rs 80,000. Availability and exact charges should be confirmed with the university.

documents.title: Academic Facilities
bullets: Air-conditioned classrooms with high-tech teaching equipment.
Well-equipped laboratories and research labs.
Well-stocked libraries.
Moot court, seminar halls, lecture halls, and auditorium.
Language labs, workshops, and computer labs.
documents.text: Invertis University official facilities page mentions air-conditioned classrooms with high-tech teaching equipment, well-equipped laboratories, well-stocked libraries, moot court, seminar halls, lecture halls, auditorium, language labs, workshops, computer labs, and research labs.

documents.title: Scholarships And Fee Concession
bullets: Merit Scholarship (UG/Diploma): 90%+ marks = 100% tuition fee waiver; 80-89.99% = 50%; 75-79.99% = 30%; 70-74.99% = 20%.
Sports Person Quota: International level = 75%; National level = 50%; State level = 25% tuition fee waiver.
Achievements in Other Fields: International level = 75%; National level = 50%; State level = 25% tuition fee waiver.
Defence Personnel and Dependants: All eligible candidates get 25% tuition fee waiver.
Important: Scholarships are valid for first year only. Tuition fee is 60% of total academic fees. Two or more scholarships cannot be clubbed; the one with greater reward applies.
IUCET scholarship is not applicable for B.Pharm and D.Pharm students.
documents.text: Invertis University offers multiple scholarship schemes. Merit Scholarship for UG/Diploma: 90% and above marks gives 100% tuition fee waiver, 80-89.99% gives 50%, 75-79.99% gives 30%, 70-74.99% gives 20%. Merit Scholarship for PG: 90% and above gives 100%, 85-89.99% gives 50%, 80-84.99% gives 30%, 75-78.99% gives 25%, 70-74.99% gives 20%, 60-69.99% gives 15% tuition fee waiver. Sports Person Quota: International participation gives 75%, National gives 50%, State gives 25% waiver. Achievements in Other Fields: same slab as Sports. Defence Personnel and Dependants get 25% waiver. JEE Mains scholarship for B.Tech: Rank 1-20000 gets 100%, 20001-30000 gets 75%, 30001-40000 gets 50%, 40001-50000 gets 30%, 50001-60000 gets 15% tuition fee waiver. CUET/CAT/MAT/IUCET: Above 95 percentile gets 100%, 90-94.99 gets 75%, 85-89.99 gets 50%, 80-84.99 gets 30%, 75-78.99 gets 20%, 70-74.99 gets 15% tuition fee waiver. CLAT scholarship: Rank 1-500 gets 100%, 501-1000 gets 75%, 1001-1500 gets 50%, 1500-2000 gets 30%, 2001-Qualified gets 20% tuition fee waiver. All scholarships are valid for first year only and tuition fee is 60% of total academic fees. Scholarships cannot be clubbed and IUCET is not applicable for B.Pharm and D.Pharm students.

documents.title: Syllabus And Curriculum
bullets: Invertis University follows a comprehensive and dynamic syllabus to prepare students for future challenges.
Syllabi are available for all UG, PG, Diploma, and Doctoral programmes.
Programme syllabi available include B.Tech (CSE, AI, Cloud, ME, EE, CE), BCA, MCA, MBA, BBA, B.Com, B.Sc., M.Sc., LLB, B.Pharmacy, and more.
IUCET (Invertis University Common Entrance Test) syllabus is also available on the syllabus page.
Students can download the official syllabus PDF for their specific programme from the official page.
Syllabus page URL: https://www.invertisuniversity.ac.in/admission/syllabus
documents.text: Invertis University follows a very comprehensive and dynamic syllabus to ensure that students become ready for all the challenges of the future. Syllabi are available for all programmes including B.Tech in CSE, AI, Cloud Computing, Mechanical, Electrical, and Civil Engineering, BCA, MCA, MBA, BBA, B.Com, B.Sc., M.Sc., LLB, B.Pharmacy, and Doctoral programmes. The IUCET entrance exam syllabus is also available. Students can download the programme-specific syllabus PDF from the official syllabus page at https://www.invertisuniversity.ac.in/admission/syllabus.
